form.formComment: He is resuming after a three months break. Finished off last campaign tenth of 12 at this track Sunlight Consol January 10 over 1100m, 5 len behind Miss Freelove carrying 57kg at $71. At his first start won by 1.1 len Sunshine Coast Cg&E Mdn-Sw November 28 over 1000m slow track defeating Zoustrology with 56.5kg at $4.80. Should be forward enough to run a big race.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after seven months favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; scored a big 3 len win at Grafton Ctry Mdn-Sw March 15 over 1100m defeating Lofty Macsporran with 58.5kg at $1.95. Previously second-up 3rd of 9 at Doomben 3yo Mdn-Sw on August 6 over 1350m, 2 len behind Whispering Rogue carrying 58kg at $3.30. Likely improver who can measure up again.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Comes off a 49 day let-up. First-up tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 0.5 len at Moe Mdn-Sw January 25 over 1100m defeating Una Gentle with 56kg at $3. Second run from a spell 5th of 10 at Seymour F&M Bm62 on February 20 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Sussex Duchess with 59.5kg at $4.20. Freshened up and having her first run under Gollan - good enough to take this out.
